SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Cart
Represents a shopping cart that contains products from different shops.
CartManager
Represents the manager of the manager of the cart which helps with all its actions.
Controller
The Controller class handles user input, manages the flow of the program, and interacts with the UI, ProductManager, ShopManager, and CartManager.
CreateDirectoryException
Custom exception class for handling directory creation-related exceptions in the ProductJsonDAO.
JsonException
Custom exception class for handling JSON-related exceptions in the ProductJsonDAO.
Main
The Main class serves as the entry point for the Digital Shopping Experience application.
Product
Clase que guarda informació i atributs sobre els productes, també amb funcions bàsiques respectives.
ProductApiDAO
The ProductApiDAO class provides data access functionality for managing product data using an API with JSON format.
ProductDAO
The ProductDAO interface defines data access functionality for managing product data using JSON files.
ProductDeserializer
The ProductDeserializer class provides custom deserialization logic for adapting JSON objects to specific subclasses of the Product class based on the "category" field.
ProductGeneral
The ProductGeneral class represents a general type of product with additional attributes such as a discount, extending the base Product class.
ProductJsonDAO
The ProductJsonDAO class provides data access functionality for managing product data using JSON files.
ProductManager
The `ProductManager` class manages operations related to products, including adding, correcting, and retrieving product information.
ProductReduced
The ProductReduced class represents a specific type of product with additional attributes such as a discount, extending the base Product class.
ProductSuperReduced
The ProductSuperReduced class represents a specific type of product with additional attributes such as a discount, extending the base Product class.
Shop
The `Shop` class represents a shop in the shopping center with basic information and functions.
ShopApiDAO
The ShopApiDAO class provides data access functionality for managing shop data using an API.
ShopDAO
The ShopDAO interface defines the contract for data access functionality related to managing shop data using JSON files.
ShopJsonDAO
The ShopJsonDAO class provides data access functionality for managing shop data using JSON files.
ShopLoyalty
The `ShopLoyalty` class represents a shop with a loyalty business model.
ShopManager
Manages shops, providing functionalities related to shop data and operations.
ShopMaxBenefit
The `ShopMaxBenefit` class represents a shop with a maximum benefit business model.
ShopSponsored
The `ShopSponsored` class represents a sponsored shop that extends the base `Shop` class.
SpecificProduct
The SpecificProduct class extends the Product class and represents a specific instance of a product with additional attributes like price, ratings, and reviews specific to a shop.
UIManager
The UIManager class is responsible for managing the user interface interactions, including displaying messages, presenting the main menu, managing product-related actions, managing shop-related actions, and collecting user input.
